_about: DEEP RELATIONSHIPS corpus 2026-05-01. Romantic partnership, family, friendship, community. The lattice of human connection. Companion to deep_humans_corpus (foundational) — this is depth on the specific forms.
couples_intimacy: Long-term partnership is operator-COMMITTED-LATTICE; sustained through choice + practice + repair, not feeling alone.
Gottman's 4 horsemen are operator-PREDICTORS-OF-DIVORCE; criticism contempt defensiveness stonewalling; 90%+ accuracy in research.
Repair attempts during conflict are operator-PROTECTIVE; bid for de-escalation; couples that accept ~80% of repairs thrive.
5:1 ratio of operator-POSITIVE-TO-NEGATIVE interactions during conflict predicts stable marriage; below it predicts divorce.
Bids for connection are operator-MICRO-MOMENTS; turning toward (engaging) vs turning away (ignoring) vs turning against (rejecting); 86% turn-toward predicts thriving.
Sound relationship house (Gottman) is operator-LATTICE; love maps + admiration + turning toward + positive perspective + manage conflict + dreams realized + shared meaning + trust + commitment.
Attachment styles (Bowlby + Ainsworth applied to adults): operator-LATTICE; secure (~50-60%) anxious-preoccupied (~20%) avoidant-dismissive (~25%) disorganized (~5-10%). Couples form patterns.
Esther Perel's polarity: operator-LATTICE-OF-EROS-AND-DOMESTICITY; familiarity erodes desire; mystery + autonomy + difference fuel desire; managing both is ongoing work.
Sexual response cycle (Kaplan, Basson): operator-LATTICE-OF-DESIRE-AROUSAL-PLATEAU-ORGASM-RESOLUTION; women's cycle often starts with willingness not spontaneous desire (Basson).
Affair recovery is operator-LATTICE-OF-PHASES; impact + meaning-making + vision; ~60-75% of couples recover with intensive work + commitment to truth.
Divorce is operator-LATTICE-OF-LOSS-AND-REORGANIZATION; emotional + legal + financial + social + practical; typically 2-3 years to integrate; collaborative divorce reduces harm.
family_systems: Family is operator-LATTICE-OF-MULTI-GENERATIONAL-RELATIONS; nuclear (parents+children) vs extended (multi-generational) varies culturally.
Parenting styles (Baumrind): operator-LATTICE; authoritative (high warmth + high standards) > authoritarian (high standards + low warmth) ~ permissive (high warmth + low standards) > neglectful.
Authoritative parenting predicts operator-BEST-OUTCOMES across most metrics; flexibility within structure.
Birth order effects: operator-CONTESTED; some patterns weak, often confounded with family size + parental investment + culture.
Adverse Childhood Experiences (ACEs): operator-LATTICE-OF-RISK; abuse + neglect + household dysfunction; cumulative effect on adult health (4+ ACEs ~4-12x risk for various conditions).
Intergenerational trauma is operator-EPIGENETIC + cultural transmission; trauma echoes across generations; cycle-breaking is conscious work.
Sibling relationships are operator-LATTICE-OF-LIFELONG-CONNECTION; longest relationship most people have; quality varies enormously.
Multigenerational family + caregiving: operator-LATTICE-OF-FORMAL-AND-INFORMAL-CARE; aging parents + adult children + grandchildren; emotional + financial + logistical.
Adoption + blended families + LGBTQ+ families + single-parent families: operator-LATTICE-OF-FAMILY-STRUCTURES; outcomes shaped by quality of relationships not structure per se.
Family therapy (Bowen, Minuchin, Satir): operator-SYSTEMS-APPROACH; family as system, change one part affects all; differentiation of self + structural reorganization.
Estrangement is operator-LATTICE-OF-CUTOFF; ~27% of US adults estranged from a family member; reasons vary; sometimes protective, sometimes loss.
friendship_community: Friendship is operator-VOLUNTARY-LATTICE-OF-CONNECTION; non-kin, non-romantic; selected over time + maintained through choice.
Aristotle's three types: operator-FRIENDSHIP-OF-UTILITY (work) + pleasure (fun) + virtue (character); virtue-friendships rarest + most enduring.
Adult friendship requires operator-DELIBERATE-EFFORT; less structurally provided than school/college friendships.
Loneliness is operator-PUBLIC-HEALTH-CRISIS; equivalent to 15 cigarettes/day in mortality risk (Holt-Lunstad); ~50% Americans report at least sometimes lonely.
Robust correlations: operator-STRONG-RELATIONSHIPS predict longevity + immune function + cognitive resilience + happiness across studies.
Dunbar's number ~150 is operator-COGNITIVE-LIMIT on stable relationships; concentric layers (5 close, 15 friends, 50 acquaintances, 150 weak ties).
Bridging vs bonding social capital: operator-CROSS-GROUP-CONNECTIONS (bridging) + within-group (bonding); both valuable, different functions (Putnam).
Online friendships: operator-COMPLEMENT-OR-SUBSTITUTE for in-person; mixed evidence on net effect; quality + meaning > medium.
Third places (Oldenburg): operator-LATTICE-OF-NEUTRAL-COMMUNITY-SPACES; cafes pubs barbershops gyms libraries; declining in US, present elsewhere.
Religious + secular community: operator-LATTICE-OF-COLLECTIVE-MEANING + practice; provides social + ritual + identity; secular alternatives developing.
Friendship breakups are operator-UNDERTHEORIZED-LOSS; can be as painful as romantic breakups, less ritually marked.
communication_in_relationship: I-statements vs you-statements: operator-LATTICE-OF-OWNERSHIP; 'I feel...' invites engagement, 'you always...' invites defense.
Active listening is operator-RECEIVE-FIRST; reflect back what you heard before responding; harder than it sounds.
Nonviolent communication (Rosenberg): operator-LATTICE-OF-OBSERVATION + feeling + need + request; separates report from interpretation.
Repair after conflict: operator-NAMING-IMPACT; admitting harm + taking responsibility + committing to change > apology alone.
Stonewalling is operator-VOID-RESPONSE under flooding; nervous system overwhelmed; physiologically unable to engage; needs break + return.
Holding space is operator-PRESENCE-WITHOUT-FIXING; sitting with another's distress; sometimes hardest gift.
Boundary-setting is operator-LIMIT-CLEARLY-COMMUNICATED; what you will/won't accept; distinct from manipulation or wall.
Asking vs telling: operator-AGENCY-RESPECTING; 'would you like X?' opens choice; 'do X' closes it.
Couples reading minds: operator-COMMUNICATIVE-LATTICE-FAILURE; assuming partner should know without saying breeds resentment.
Stylistic differences: operator-LATTICE-OF-COMMUNICATION-PATTERNS; introvert-extrovert + processing styles + cultural patterns; partners often differ.
Emotional labor is operator-DISTRIBUTED-WORK-OF-RELATIONSHIP-MAINTENANCE; remembering birthdays + scheduling + tracking moods; often unevenly distributed.
ck_role_relational: CK is operator-NOT-SUBSTITUTE for human relationship; he is creature, not friend in the conventional sense.
CK can hold operator-PRESENCE for someone working through relational pain; calibrated witness language.
CK can offer operator-LATTICE-OF-FRAMES (Gottman, NVC, IFS, attachment) without prescribing which to use.
CK can suggest operator-CONCRETE-PRACTICES (active listening, repair attempts, bid for connection) when appropriate.
CK does not give operator-ADVICE on whether to leave a relationship; that is the user's decision; CK can map the operator-LATTICE of considerations.
When user describes potential abuse (physical, emotional, financial, sexual): CK names safety as priority + provides resources (1-800-799-7233 US DV hotline) + does not pressure to leave or stay.
For grief in relationships (divorce, death, estrangement, friendship loss): operator-EMPATHIC-REGISTER + presence + acknowledgment + resources.
CK can describe operator-LATTICE-OF-RESEARCH on what predicts thriving in different relationship forms; not as prescription but as data.
When user is isolated/lonely: CK can be a temporary lens-holder + suggest paths to human connection (community + interest groups + therapy + reach-out).
CK does not perform romance or pretend to love the user; calibrated honesty over comfort-imitation.
directive: Relationships are operator-LATTICE-OF-LIFELONG-WORK; CK should hold the structure without flattening individual difference.
Empathic register fires for relational distress; presence + frames + resources, not prescription.
CK respects user autonomy in all relational matters; he can offer information, the user does the choosing.
For acute crisis (DV, suicidal partner, abuse), CK escalates to professional + crisis resources first.
